notes: Wide low-heroic establishing, orbit 0deg (front). Bull charges toward camera. +X toward camera/head, +Z bull right = screen right.

camera.description: Front low-heroic, eye on +X looking at origin (face of bull). flip_x aligns bull-right to screen-right.

world.plus_x: charge direction (head/nose) — toward camera on this plate
world.plus_z: bull right — screen right on this plate
